name: photographer-project
description: Photographer portfolio website with admin panel

scripts.db:reset: docker compose --profile dev down -v && docker compose --profile dev up -d postgres
scripts.db:prod:reset: docker compose --profile prod down -v && docker compose --profile prod up -d postgres-prod
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n be,fe -c cyan,magenta "cd backend && npm run start:dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
